pi_items.source: Verified from task description requirements and verifier script (KALAHARI_LAT_RAD calculation).
Verified from task description requirements and verifier script (KALAHARI_LON_RAD calculation).
Mathematically calculated from target_lat_deg (-26.95 * pi / 180) and matching expected KALAHARI_LAT_RAD in verifier.
Mathematically calculated from target_lon_deg (24.73 * pi / 180) and matching expected KALAHARI_LON_RAD in verifier.
Task description requests disabling atmosphere and enabling both azimuthal and galactic grids, checking matching boolean variables in verifier.py logic.
Verified against target output path in task instructions and export_result.sh parsing script.
Verified against default Stellarium snapshot directory in export_result.sh SCREENSHOT_DIR.
Verified against task instruction to take a screenshot and verifier requiring new_screenshot_count >= 1.

privileged_info_summary: The nocturnal insect navigation task entails configuring Stellarium for a simulated South African field site. The verified required location is -26.95 degrees latitude (-0.47037 radians) and 24.73 degrees longitude (0.43162 radians) on November 1, 2024. The agent must disable the atmosphere while enabling both Azimuthal and Galactic grids. Additionally, the agent must save at least 1 screenshot to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium and write a field plan document to /home/ga/Desktop/beetle_field_plan.txt containing necessary keywords. All metrics, file paths, coordinates, and configurations were validated against the task instructions and scoring scripts.
